name: Alert Notify (Feishu/WeCom)
info:
Send alert notification via configured channels (Feishu, WeCom).

Input: 
  msg.payload.channel = 'feishu' | 'wecom' | 'all' (default: 'all')
  msg.payload.title = alert title
  msg.payload.message = alert body
  msg.payload.severity = 'info' | 'warning' | 'critical' (default: 'warning')

Output: msg.payload = { success: bool, channels: [...] }

nodes.name: format alert
